sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions after clicking G(9,49)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Key objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'O', 'G', 'p'] and n['pixels'] >= 12 and n['children']:
        rows = [pt[0] for pt in n['boundary']]
        cols = [pt[1] for pt in n['boundary']]
        center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        print(f"  {c}: center~{center}, children={[seg['nodes'][ch]['color'] for ch in n['children']]}")

# Check ring area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRing area (rows 15-22, cols 50-63):")
for r in range(15, 23):
    print(f"  {r}: {ascii_lines[r][50:64]}")

print("\nUpper chain (rows 5-22, cols 5-50):")
for r in range(5, 23):
    line = ascii_lines[r][5:50]
    if any(c not in 'BB' for c in line):
        print(f"  {r}: {line}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
